name: 🎉 Vibe Coder's First Import Test
description: This course was imported automatically to test the new import system. Created for the ultimate vibe coder! 😎

modules.title: Module 1: Welcome to Auto-Import
modules.content:
🚀 Welcome, Vibe Coder!

This module was automatically imported by Claude (your AI assistant) while you relaxed and vibed. 😎

What This Proves:

  • ✅ Your import system works perfectly
  • ✅ JSON to database conversion is smooth
  • ✅ HTML content renders correctly
  • ✅ Module ordering works
  • ✅ You can now import real courses!

💡 Pro Tip

Now that this works, you can import entire courses by just uploading JSON files. No more manual database entry!

Next Steps:

  1. Check your course catalog to see this course
  2. Try the Course Converter with the Import Now button
  3. Import your real course content
  4. Keep vibing! 🎵

modules.title: Module 2: How It Works
modules.description: Behind the scenes of the import system
modules.content:
⚙️ Behind the Scenes

Here's what happened when this course was imported:

1. JSON file created with course data
2. Sent to /api/admin/courses/import-simple
3. Backend validated the structure
4. Course created in database
5. Modules inserted with proper ordering
6. Success response returned
7. You can now see it in the catalog!

The Magic Behind It:

  • Backend: Hono + TypeScript
  • Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
  • Auth: Simple password protection
  • Frontend: Course Converter with Import Now button

This is just the beginning. You can now import courses with multiple modules, quizzes, resources, and more!
